The '''[[Citadel Station]] Ithorian Compound''' was located in [[Residential Module 082]] of [[Citadel Station]] in orbit above [[Telos IV]]. The compound was the headquarters for [[Chodo Habat]], who was in charge of the [[Telosian Restoration Project]]. When the [[Meetra Surik|Jedi Exile]] came to Citadel Station, she [[Skirmishes on Citadel Station|helped]] the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] at the compound expose [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation's]] illegal activities to the [[Telos Security Force]] and convince [[Loppak Slusk]] of [[Exchange|the Exchange]] to stop harassing the Ithorians. In return, Habat helped restore some of the Exile's connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Soon after, the Exile saved Chodo, his assistant [[Moza]], and the rest of the Ithorians at the compound from an [[Skirmish in the Ithorian Compound|attack]] by Czerka's [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].

Later, when [[Darth Nihilus]] attacked Telos IV, the Jedi Exile, combined with troops from [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]], and others, launched their [[Battle of Telos IV|counter-attack]] against the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] forces aboard the station, using the Ithorian Compound as a staging ground.

==Behind the scenes==
If the Exile chooses to follow the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] path during ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', then she or he sides with Czerka and stops the Ithorians. The Exile can also illegally smuggle leaves from the Ithorians' [[Bachani/Legends|bachani plant]] for [[Samhan Dobo]], regardless of whether the Exile sides with the Ithorians or Czerka.
